deep_dive.executive_summary: At $115.53, the base case yields 6.11% per year over seven years on $4.46 per ADS normalized owner cash (FY2025 filing free cash flow). Alibaba is China's largest commerce ecosystem with a fast-growing AI cloud franchise, but FY2026 reported free cash flow was negative RMB 46.6 billion after RMB 122 billion of AI and quick-commerce capital spending. Ant Group and other equity stakes (RMB 210 billion carrying value) are scanned as options, not in base return. VIE complexity, partial dhando, and return below our ~15% hurdle support watch until price or normalized cash flow improves.

decision.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

components.label: Operating business (fallback)
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Risk and timing are reflected in the low/base/high range.
components.falsifier: Owner cash, reinvestment economics, or competitive position remains below the low-case path for two reporting periods.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

components.label: Operating business (fallback)
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Risk and timing are reflected in the low/base/high range.
components.falsifier: Owner cash, reinvestment economics, or competitive position remains below the low-case path for two reporting periods.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

method_fit.label: High-return compounder
applicability_tests: Owner earnings can be separated from stock compensation, working capital, and maintenance capital.
Incremental returns on retained capital are observable and durable.
The competitive advantage explains pricing, retention, share, or cost outcomes.
Terminal value is supported by a reinvestment runway rather than an unexplained multiple.
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: A complete security value is intentionally withheld while material components are unpriced. Attribution restarts after the first proof-complete baseline.

component_valuation.decision_rule: Operating-only fallback. Add an explicit component_valuation schedule before drawing asset-level conclusions.

valuation_proof.adjustment: Risk and timing are reflected in the low/base/high range.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Owner cash, reinvestment economics, or competitive position remains below the low-case path for two reporting periods.

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

timeline.label: Net income moved -38.5% versus the prior period (130,109.0 to 80,009.0).
Basic EPS moved -42.7% versus the prior period (6.9 to 4.0).
FY2026 20-F: AI + Cloud declared primary growth engine; Qwen3.7-Max, T-Head chips at scale; quick commerce subsidies weigh on China EBITA
FY2026 segment restructure: Taobao/Tmall + Ele.me + Fliggy combined into Alibaba China E-commerce Group; Cainiao/Amap/media to All others
Qwen app launched as consumer AI assistant integrated across Taobao, Alipay, Amap ecosystem
Articles of Association amended; 2024 equity incentive plans adopted
Six business groups reorganized (Cloud, China commerce, AIDC, Local services, Cainiao, Media) under holding company model
SEC added Alibaba to HFCA Act provisional list (PCAOB audit access); delisting overhang for US ADS
Ant Group IPO suspended after regulatory interview; RMB 18.2B antitrust fine on Alibaba announced
Ant Group IPO halted two days before listing; fintech regulatory reset begins
Secondary listing on Hong Kong Stock Exchange (9988.HK) alongside NYSE ADS
Jack Ma stepped down as executive chairman; Daniel Zhang became chairman (later CEO transition to Eddie Wu)
NYSE IPO at $68/ADS; largest global IPO at the time
SAPA agreement: Alibaba acquired ~33% economic interest in Ant Group (then Alipay)
Alibaba Group Holding Limited incorporated in Cayman Islands; Taobao and Alipay ecosystem founded in Hangzhou

industry.structure: China online retail is a duopoly-plus market: Alibaba (Taobao/Tmall) vs Pinduoduo and Douyin-commerce for share; cloud is oligopoly with Alibaba Cloud, Huawei, and Tencent among leaders; VIE structure adds legal complexity for foreign ADS holders.
industry.share_shift: PDD and Douyin gained China retail GMV share while Alibaba invested in quick commerce (Taobao Instant Commerce) and AI-cloud; Cloud Intelligence external revenue accelerated to +40% in Q4 FY2026 per CEO letter.
industry.trend: AI agent era drives Cloud capex and Qwen model investment; quick-commerce 30-minute delivery is now a strategic subsidy battle; US-China tech export controls affect GPU access; buybacks slowed sharply in FY2026 (RMB 7.6B vs ~RMB 89B prior year).
